results.gold_sql: SELECT e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_employees_scd e ON f.employee_surr_id = e.employee_surr_id JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id WHERE e.is_active = TRUE AND s.store_branch_state = 'Ny' GROUP BY e.employee_src_id, e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

results.question: Which product has the highest average profit margin?
